findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 39. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Ensure the main landmark is at top level
findings.evidence:
Fix any of the following:
  The main landmark is contained in another landmark. [<main>]

findings.description: Ensure the document has at most one main landmark
findings.evidence:
Fix any of the following:
  Document has more than one main landmark [<main>]

Fix any of the following:
  The landmark must have a unique aria-label, aria-labelledby, or title to make landmarks distinguishable [<main>]

findings.description: The NC Energy, Mineral & Land Resources logo/graphic present in the PDF header is missing from the HTML rendering.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows the NC tree logo with 'Energy, Mineral & Land Resources / ENVIRONMENTAL QUALITY' text beneath it in the upper left. The HTML page 2 header area does not display this logo image.

findings.description: Repeated header/footer content inserted between page-equivalent sections in the HTML disrupts reading order.
findings.evidence: The HTML rendering (page 2) shows the footer from the first PDF page followed by a second rendering of the full header (PAT McCRORY, Governor, etc.) and a second MEMORANDUM heading before the content continues. In the PDF, there is one continuous memo without this duplication mid-flow.
